changes.reason: Concept activation exception: route VALID_1DTE_ONLY through a companion pullback profile in addition to the existing breakout_long_1dte, without changing VALID_0DTE or no-0DTE routing. The current 1DTE slice is meaningful but tail-heavy enough to justify attribution rather than direct tightening.

Enable the dormant 1DTE pullback companion as an attribution probe. Current profile config already has enabled=true but it is absent from the one-DTE router, so this run tests reachability and cannibalization versus breakout_long_1dte.

Keep the existing breakout 1DTE branch from stretching too far while the companion is introduced. Grid value 6 is a middle setting that preserves upside better than 4 but avoids letting breakout consume all convex 1DTE continuation by target priority.

expected_effect: Should expose whether VALID_1DTE_ONLY contains a separable pullback/reclaim regime while preserving the existing breakout_long_1dte edge. Desired outcome is flat-or-better combined 1DTE PnL, improved 1DTE average/worst MAE or exposure efficiency, and no damage to VALID_0DTE performance. Main tradeoff is router cannibalization: if pullback_long_1dte simply relabels profitable breakout trades or reduces 1DTE PnL below the current $1315.3 slice, reject.
label: one-dte-pullback-companion-attribution
rationale: Use a new-profile-config router split rather than another global veto or repeated call-wall/charm-wall keyset. run_058 has clean data-state attribution: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributes 20 trades, $1315.3 PnL, no slow trades, but worst MAE is still -386.75 and median hold is longer than the best 0DTE pullback/charm edges. Direct 1DTE tightening has been risky, so the better experiment is attribution: add the dormant pullback_long_1dte companion to the one-DTE router and measure whether it separates reclaim behavior from breakout continuation. This is one logical family and does not allow option-confirmed 0DTE profiles to trade on missing/stale/thin 0DTE data.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY currently contributes 20 trades and $1315.3 with no slow >=12h trades, but worst MAE is -386.75 and PnL/exposure is 170.09, below the strongest VALID_0DTE pullback/charm profiles. A companion route may separate pullback/reclaim from breakout continuation without weakening the current breakout profile directly.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Router overlap may cannibalize breakout_long_1dte winners, or pullback_long_1dte may be unreachable despite activation because only limited tunables are exposed.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than clean breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= $1315.3, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL/trades explicitly measured, 1DTE average/worst MAE flat or better, total net profit >=98% of run_044, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long still owns the -655.2 worst MAE while contributing $640.5 on only two trades; static filters repeatedly risk profit suppression because the worst tail is also the largest winner.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a two-trade profile and cut rare convex recoveries unless protected fast-winner retention and out-of-sample days are validated.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long entry with wide target or extended ES-VWAP that fails to convert early favorable movement into sustained continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce call-wall worst MAE below -655.2 while retaining at least 70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, PnL per exposure hour flat or better, and no slow trades.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short, high-win-rate, take-profit-only SPX500 long scalper regime over about 12.3 days. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so the real optimization target is hidd...

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= $1315, 1DTE average/worst MAE flat or better, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL explicitly measured, total risk-adjusted score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Dormant Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or lowers combined charm/pin worst MAE, total net profit >=98% of leader, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, no slow trades.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Early Progress Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves below -655.2 toward <= -513.4 while retaining >=90% affected-profile PnL, >=95% protected fast winners, and total score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Call-wall worst MAE materially improves, >=70% call-wall PnL retained, total net profit >=98% of leader, PnL/hour flat or better, no slow trades.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Delta Charm Breakout Dormant Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Positive standalone PnL, no more than 10% degradation in squeeze/charm-wall combined PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, worst MAE no worse than -513.4.
